title: Mobs & Mobstress
description: Adds female variants of Skeletons and Zombies
body:
This pack adds female versions of Skeletons, Strays, Bogged, Wither Skeleton, Zombie, Husk and Drowned
There is a 50% chance these mobs will spawn as the female version It NEEDS OPTIFINE

Update : 
Female Pillager, Evokers and Vindiactors have been added.
Wizaard, male version of witch, has been added.
